degraded_reason: Parent implemented the selected public helper test bead directly and used two independent reviewer subagents plus targeted re-review subagents.
implementation_summary: Added a public helper workflow test covering streaming success, partial failure, stream cancellation, retry, compaction, interrupt, resume, lifecycle cancellation, and generic error helpers.

Verified first-token latency, total latency, token usage including known zero output tokens, stream cancellation events, lifecycle metadata, metadata redaction, input/output/compaction summary redaction, correlation, public identity, timing, and error envelopes.
Strengthened the test after review to pin lifecycle metadata redaction, stream output summaries, public observation identity, event identity, timestamps, partial usage, and lifecycle error fields.
review_blocker_summary: Initial reviews requested stronger assertions for lifecycle metadata and redaction, public observation identity/timing, stream output summary redaction, and lifecycle error envelopes.
